    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AudioLoanItem
    A loan for an audio.
    BookLoanItem
    A loan for a book.
    LoanItem
    Represents a loan that has been placed by someone for something.
    LoanItemAddModal
    A modal dialog for adding a loan item.
    LoanItemFactory
    A factory that creates loan items.
    LoanItemFactory.Audio
    Data necessary to construct a AudioLoanItem.
    LoanItemFactory.Book
    Data necessary to construct a BookLoanItem.
    LoanItemFactory.Loan
    Data necessary to construct a LoanItem.
    LoanItemFactory.Video
    Data necessary to construct a VideoLoanItem.
    LoanItemPredicateFactory
    Constructs predicates on loan items.
    LoanItemsController
    Manages loan items and their persistence.
    LoanItemsPrintCollector
    A collector that prints a stream of loan items.
    LoanItemsTracker
    Core class for managing loans.
    LoanItemsTrackerCli
    The command line loan items tracker.
    LoanItemsTrackerGui
    Core class for running the loan items tracker GUI app.
    Menu
    A menu that allows the user to perform actions using through selections.
    Menu.Action
    What a menu does.
    Menu.Option
    An option on the selection menu.
    Parser<T>
    Parses a string into a value.
    PersistenceException
    Indicates persistence failure.
    Prompt<T>
    A prompt for the user to input a value.
    PromptException
    Indicates that the user has provided a bad input.
    PromptFactory
    Creates prompts.
    RuntimeTypeAdapterFactory<T>
    Adapts values whose runtime type may differ from their declaration type.
    SaveManager
    Loads and saves loan items.
    Validator<T>
    Validates a value that the user gave.
    ValidatorFactory
    Creates validators.
    VideoLoanItem
    A loan for a video.
